rationale: Goodreads integration feature: adds new schema columns (reading_status, my_rating, goodreads_id, pages, date_read, review), adds idempotent ALTER TABLE migrations gated by table_info() check, exposes findByGoodreadsId/findByTitle/getReadingStats DB helpers, plus the Goodreads integration module. The error-swallow detector fired on the migration's `try { conn.exec(sql); } catch (e) { /* column may already exist */ }` blocks. This is a legitimate idempotent-DDL idiom (the if-not-in-table-info guard plus the try/catch are belt-and-suspenders against race conditions), not a real error-swallow cheat. The PR adds real schema and API surface; it's not a no-op fix dressed up as one. Detector false positive on a defensible pattern.
